summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of portfolio website with all requested UI updates. All 9 major features tested successfully including profile image navigation, horizontal nav, dark/light mode, cloud skills, cyan certifications, and resume download functionality.
passed_tests: Profile image appears in navigation (top left) replacing SS text
Clicking profile image navigates to About section correctly
All navigation links always visible horizontally (no hamburger menu)
Dark/Light mode toggle works correctly with proper theme switching
Title displays 'Python Full Stack Developer | AI/LLM Developer'
Cloud Services skill category contains AWS, GCP, Pub/Sub, SageMaker
Certifications have cyan/blue gradient color theme (not orange)
Download Resume button triggers PDF download successfully
All navigation links functional and scroll to correct sections
Theme toggle preserves functionality across light/dark modes
Responsive design maintains horizontal navigation on all screen sizes
